cards.title: Claim Rules
cards.content:
• Role of Surveyor (Section 64UM)
• Insured's Duty to Minimize Loss
• Arbitration Clause (Quantum Disputes)
• Claim Repudiation (Rejection)

cards.title: 1. Mandatory Rule (Rs. 20,000)
cards.content: As per Section 64UM, a licensed surveyor is MANDATORY for claims of Rs. 20,000 or MORE.

cards.title: 2. Surveyor Profile
cards.content: Independent professionals licensed by IRDAI. They calculate the financial loss. Report is not binding but crucial.

cards.title: 3. Arbitration Clause
cards.content: Used ONLY for disputes regarding the AMOUNT (Quantum). Cannot be used if company rejects liability entirely.

cards.title: 4. Duty to Minimize Loss
cards.content: Insured must act as if they are UNINSURED. Must take all steps to put out fire or save property.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Arbitration Use: Only for Claim Amount (Quantum).
Insured's Duty: Minimize loss (as if uninsured).

cards.title: Q2. Dispute over claim amount resolution?
